positive: A high-contrast, symmetrical illustration of a mythical bioluminescent forest scene. The central subject is a majestic, stylized celestial owl perched on a crystalline, geometric branch. The surrounding elements include floating, glowing nebula-like flora and constellations rendered in detailed linework. Style should blend Art Deco symmetry with delicate Art Nouveau organic forms. Use a limited, vibrant palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, luminous teal, and gold accents. Emphasis on strong silhouette, clean lines, and dramatic rim lighting. Vector illustration quality, suitable for repeat apparel print, minimalist yet detailed composition.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, grain, poorly drawn, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, grayscale, muted colors
